<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/src/lib/export.ts`

```text
     1→import chroma from "chroma-js";
     2→import type { ColorEntry, ExportFormat, ColorSpace } from "../types/palette";
     3→
     4→function colorValue(entry: ColorEntry, space: ColorSpace): string {
     5→  const c = chroma(entry.hex);
     6→  switch (space) {
     7→    case "hsl":
     8→      return `hsl(${entry.hslString})`;
     9→    case "hex":
    10→      return entry.hex;
    11→    case "rgb": {
    12→      const [r, g, b] = c.rgb();
    13→      return `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`;
    14→    }
    15→    case "hcl": {
    16→      const [h, c2, l] = c.hcl();
    17→      const hR = Math.round(h || 0);
    18→      const cR = Math.round(c2 * 10) / 10;
    19→      const lR = Math.round(l * 10) / 10;
    20→      return `hcl(${hR}, ${cR}, ${lR})`;
    21→    }
    22→    case "oklch": {
    23→      const [l, c2, h] = c.oklch();
    24→      const lR = Math.round(l * 1000) / 1000;
    25→      const cR = Math.round(c2 * 1000) / 1000;
    26→      const hR = Math.round(h || 0);
    27→      return `oklch(${lR} ${cR} ${hR})`;
    28→    }
    29→  }
    30→}
    31→
    32→export function formatPalette(
    33→  entries: ColorEntry[],
    34→  format: ExportFormat,
    35→  space: ColorSpace,
    36→): string {
    37→  switch (format) {
    38→    case "css":
    39→      return formatCSS(entries, space);
    40→    case "tw4":
    41→      return formatTailwindV4(entries, space);
    42→    case "tw3":
    43→      return formatTailwindV3(entries, space);
    44→    case "scss":
    45→      return formatSCSS(entries, space);
    46→    case "js":
    47→      return formatJS(entries, space);
    48→    case "json":
    49→      return formatJSON(entries, space);
    50→    case "gpl":
    51→      return formatGPL(entries);
    52→    case "text":
    53→      return formatText(entries, space);
    54→  }
    55→}
    56→
    57→function formatCSS(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
    58→  const vars = entries
    59→    .map((e) => `  --${e.label}: ${colorValue(e, space)};`)
    60→    .join("\n");
    61→  return `:root {\n${vars}\n}`;
    62→}
    63→
    64→function formatTailwindV4(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
    65→  const vars = entries
    66→    .map((e) => `  --color-${e.label}: ${colorValue(e, space)};`)
    67→    .join("\n");
    68→  return `@theme {\n${vars}\n}`;
    69→}
    70→
    71→function formatTailwindV3(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
    72→  const colors: Record<string, string> = {};
    73→  for (const e of entries) {
    74→    const num = e.label.replace("grey-", "");
    75→    colors[num] = colorValue(e, space);
    76→  }
    77→  const inner = JSON.stringify({ grey: colors }, null, 4)
    78→    .split("\n")
    79→    .map((line) => `      ${line}`)
    80→    .join("\n")
    81→    .trim();
    82→  return `/** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */\nmodule.exports = {\n  theme: {\n    extend: {\n      colors: ${inner},\n    },\n  },\n};`;
    83→}
    84→
    85→function formatSCSS(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
    86→  return entries
    87→    .map((e) => `$${e.label}: ${colorValue(e, space)};`)
    88→    .join("\n");
    89→}
    90→
    91→function formatJS(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
    92→  const colors: Record<string, string> = {};
    93→  for (const e of entries) {
    94→    const num = e.label.replace("grey-", "");
    95→    colors[num] = colorValue(e, space);
    96→  }
    97→  return `export const grey = ${JSON.stringify(colors, null, 2)} as const;`;
    98→}
    99→
   100→function formatJSON(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
   101→  const tokens: Record<string, { $value: string; $type: string }> = {};
   102→  for (const e of entries) {
   103→    const num = e.label.replace("grey-", "");
   104→    tokens[num] = {
   105→      $value: colorValue(e, space),
   106→      $type: "color",
   107→    };
   108→  }
   109→  return JSON.stringify({ grey: tokens }, null, 2);
   110→}
   111→
   112→function formatGPL(entries: ColorEntry[]): string {
   113→  const lines = ["GIMP Palette", "Name: Grey Neutrals", `Columns: ${entries.length}`, "#"];
   114→  for (const e of entries) {
   115→    const c = chroma(e.hex);
   116→    const [r, g, b] = c.rgb();
   117→    lines.push(`${String(r).padStart(3)} ${String(g).padStart(3)} ${String(b).padStart(3)}\t${e.label}`);
   118→  }
   119→  return lines.join("\n");
   120→}
   121→
   122→function formatText(entries: ColorEntry[], space: ColorSpace): string {
   123→  const maxLabel = Math.max(...entries.map((e) => e.label.length));
   124→  return entries
   125→    .map((e) => `${e.label.padEnd(maxLabel)}  ${colorValue(e, space)}`)
   126→    .join("\n");
   127→}
   128→
   129→const FORMAT_EXTENSIONS: Record<ExportFormat, string> = {
   130→  css: "css",
   131→  tw4: "css",
   132→  tw3: "js",
   133→  scss: "scss",
   134→  js: "ts",
   135→  json: "json",
   136→  gpl: "gpl",
   137→  text: "txt",
   138→};
   139→
   140→export function downloadPalette(
   141→  entries: ColorEntry[],
   142→  format: ExportFormat,
   143→  space: ColorSpace,
   144→): void {
   145→  const content = formatPalette(entries, format, space);
   146→  const ext = FORMAT_EXTENSIONS[format];
   147→  const blob = new Blob([content], { type: "text/plain;charset=utf-8" });
   148→  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   149→  const a = document.createElement("a");
   150→  a.href = url;
   151→  a.download = `palette.${ext}`;
   152→  a.click();
   153→  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
   154→}
   155→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import chroma from "chroma-js";
     2→
     3→export function getContrastColor(bgColor: string): string {
     4→  const whiteContrast = chroma.contrast("white", bgColor);
     5→  return whiteContrast < 2.9 ? "#1d1d1d" : "#ffffff";
     6→}
     7→
```

```text
    10→export function ExportDialog() {

    12→  const [format, setFormat] = useState<ExportFormat>("css");

    23→        >
    24→          Export

    41→                initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.96, y: 8 }}

    43→                exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.96, y: 8 }}
    44→                transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
    45→                className="fixed left-1/2 top-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-50 w-full max-w-xl p-6 rounded-2xl bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)] border border-white/[0.08] shadow-2xl"
    46→              >
    47→                <Dialog.Title className="text-lg font-semibold text-white/90 mb-4">
    48→                  Export Palette
    49→                </Dialog.Title>
    50→                <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
    51→                  <FormatSelector
    52→                    format={format}
    53→                    onFormatChange={setFormat}
    54→                    space={space}
    55→                    onSpaceChange={setSpace}

    57→                  <ExportPreview

    66→                    aria-label="Close"
```

```text
     1→import { useCopyToClipboard } from "../../hooks/useCopyToClipboard";
     2→
     3→interface ExportPreviewProps {
     4→  code: string;
     5→  onDownload: () => void;
     6→}
     7→
     8→export function ExportPreview({ code, onDownload }: ExportPreviewProps) {
     9→  const { copiedLabel, copy } = useCopyToClipboard();
    10→
    11→  return (
    12→    <div className="relative">
    13→      <pre className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-black/60 border border-white/[0.06] overflow-auto max-h-[400px] text-[13px] font-mono leading-relaxed text-white/80">
    14→        {code}
    15→      </pre>
    16→      <div className="absolute top-3 right-3 flex gap-2">
    17→        <button
    18→          type="button"
    19→          onClick={onDownload}
    20→          className="px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md bg-white/10 text-white/90 hover:bg-white/15 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
    21→        >
    22→          Download
    23→        </button>
    24→        <button
    25→          type="button"
    26→          onClick={() => copy(code, "export")}
    27→          className="px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md bg-white/10 text-white/90 hover:bg-white/15 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
    28→        >
    29→          {copiedLabel === "export" ? "Copied!" : "Copy"}
    30→        </button>
    31→      </div>
    32→    </div>
    33→  );
    34→}
    35→
```

```text
     2→import type { ExportFormat, ColorSpace } from "../../types/palette";
     3→
     4→interface FormatSelectorProps {
     5→  format: ExportFormat;
     6→  onFormatChange: (format: ExportFormat) => void;
     7→  space: ColorSpace;
     8→  onSpaceChange: (space: ColorSpace) => void;
     9→}
    10→
    11→const formats: { value: ExportFormat; label: string }[] = [
    12→  { value: "css", label: "CSS" },
    13→  { value: "tw4", label: "TW v4" },
    14→  { value: "tw3", label: "TW v3" },
    15→  { value: "scss", label: "SCSS" },
    16→  { value: "js", label: "JS/TS" },
    17→  { value: "json", label: "JSON" },
    18→  { value: "gpl", label: "GPL" },
    19→  { value: "text", label: "Text" },
    20→];
    21→
    22→const spaces: { value: ColorSpace; label: string }[] = [
    23→  { value: "hsl", label: "HSL" },
    24→  { value: "hex", label: "HEX" },
    25→  { value: "rgb", label: "RGB" },
    26→  { value: "hcl", label: "HCL" },
    27→  { value: "oklch", label: "OKLCH" },
    28→];
    29→
    30→const tabTrigger =
    31→  "flex-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-white/50 transition-colors data-[state=active]:bg-white/10 data-[state=active]:text-white hover:text-white/70 cursor-pointer";
    32→
    33→export function FormatSelector({
    34→  format,
    35→  onFormatChange,
    36→  space,
    37→  onSpaceChange,
    38→}: FormatSelectorProps) {
    39→  return (
    40→    <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
    41→      <div>
    42→        <span className="text-[11px] font-mono text-white/30 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 block">
    43→          Format
    44→        </span>
    45→        <Tabs.Root
    46→          value={format}
    47→          onValueChange={(v) => onFormatChange(v as ExportFormat)}
    48→        >
    49→          <Tabs.List className="flex gap-1 p-1 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04]">
    50→            {formats.map((f) => (
    51→              <Tabs.Trigger key={f.value} value={f.value} className={tabTrigger}>
    52→                {f.label}
    53→              </Tabs.Trigger>
    54→            ))}
    55→          </Tabs.List>
    56→        </Tabs.Root>
    57→      </div>
    58→      <div>
    59→        <span className="text-[11px] font-mono text-white/30 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 block">
    60→          Color Space
    61→        </span>
    62→        <Tabs.Root
    63→          value={space}
    64→          onValueChange={(v) => onSpaceChange(v as ColorSpace)}
    65→        >
    66→          <Tabs.List className="flex gap-1 p-1 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04]">
    67→            {spaces.map((s) => (
    68→              <Tabs.Trigger key={s.value} value={s.value} className={tabTrigger}>
    69→                {s.label}
    70→              </Tabs.Trigger>
    71→            ))}
    72→          </Tabs.List>
    73→        </Tabs.Root>
    74→      </div>
    75→    </div>
    76→  );
    77→}
    78→
```

```text
     1→import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
     2→
     3→export function useCopyToClipboard(timeout = 1500) {
     4→  const [copiedLabel, setCopiedLabel] = useState<string | null>(null);
     5→  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);
     6→
     7→  const copy = useCallback(
     8→    (text: string, label: string) => {
     9→      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
    10→        setCopiedLabel(label);
    11→        clearTimeout(timerRef.current);
    12→        timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopiedLabel(null), timeout);
    13→      });
    14→    },
    15→    [timeout],
    16→  );
    17→
    18→  return { copiedLabel, copy };
    19→}
    20→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./app/src/components/palette/PaletteGrid.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
     2→import { ColorSwatch } from "./ColorSwatch";
     3→import { useCopyToClipboard } from "../../hooks/useCopyToClipboard";
     4→import type { ColorEntry } from "../../types/palette";
     5→
     6→interface PaletteGridProps {
     7→  entries: ColorEntry[];
     8→}
     9→
    10→const STEP_OPTIONS = [8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 24, 48, 98];
    11→
    12→type Orientation = "picker" | "rotated";
    13→
    14→function sampleEntries(entries: ColorEntry[], count: number): ColorEntry[] {
    15→  if (count >= entries.length) return entries;
    16→  const step = (entries.length - 1) / (count - 1);
    17→  return Array.from({ length: count }, (_, i) =>
    18→    entries[Math.round(i * step)],
    19→  );
    20→}
    21→
    22→// Find the column count that produces no orphans and the most square-ish grid
    23→function bestCols(total: number): number {
    24→  const target = Math.round(Math.sqrt(total));
    25→  // Search outward from the square root for a clean divisor
    26→  for (let d = 0; d <= target; d++) {
    27→    if ((target + d) > 0 && total % (target + d) === 0) return target + d;
    28→    if ((target - d) > 0 && total % (target - d) === 0) return target - d;
    29→  }
    30→  return target;
    31→}
    32→
    33→// Reorder row-major entries into column-major order for CSS grid rendering
    34→function toColumnMajor(entries: ColorEntry[], cols: number): ColorEntry[] {
    35→  const rows = Math.ceil(entries.length / cols);
    36→  const reordered: ColorEntry[] = [];
    37→  for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
    38→    for (let c = 0; c < cols; c++) {
    39→      const idx = c * rows + r;
    40→      if (idx < entries.length) reordered.push(entries[idx]);
    41→    }
    42→  }
    43→  return reordered;
    44→}
    45→
    46→export function PaletteGrid({ entries }: PaletteGridProps) {
    47→  const { copiedLabel, copy } = useCopyToClipboard();
    48→  const [showBorders, setShowBorders] = useState(true);
    49→  const [showLabels, setShowLabels] = useState(true);
    50→  const [swatchCount, setSwatchCount] = useState<number>(98);
    51→  const [orientation, setOrientation] = useState<Orientation>("picker");
    52→
    53→  const { displayEntries, cols } = useMemo(() => {
    54→    const sampled = sampleEntries(entries, swatchCount);
    55→    const cols = bestCols(sampled.length);
    56→
    57→    if (orientation === "picker") {
    58→      // Light at top, dark at bottom — entries are light→dark,
    59→      // row-major: flows left→right across rows, then next row
    60→      return { displayEntries: sampled, cols };
    61→    }
    62→    // Rotated 90°: dark at top-left, light at bottom-right
    63→    // entries reversed to dark→light, then column-major so lightness flows down
    64→    const reversed = sampled.slice().reverse();
    65→    return { displayEntries: toColumnMajor(reversed, cols), cols };
    66→  }, [entries, swatchCount, orientation]);
    67→
    68→  return (
    69→    <div>
    70→      <div className="flex justify-end items-center gap-3 px-4 lg:pr-0 mb-1">
    71→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    72→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">swatches</span>
    73→          <select
    74→            value={swatchCount}
    75→            onChange={(e) => setSwatchCount(Number(e.target.value))}
    76→            className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/40 bg-transparent border-none outline-none cursor-pointer"
    77→          >
    78→            {STEP_OPTIONS.map((n) => (
    79→              <option key={n} value={n} className="bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)]">
    80→                {n}
    81→              </option>
    82→            ))}
    83→          </select>
    84→        </label>
    85→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    86→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">orientation</span>
    87→          <select
    88→            value={orientation}
    89→            onChange={(e) => setOrientation(e.target.value as Orientation)}
    90→            className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/40 bg-transparent border-none outline-none cursor-pointer"
    91→          >
    92→            <option value="picker" className="bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)]">picker</option>
    93→            <option value="rotated" className="bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)]">rotated</option>
    94→          </select>
    95→        </label>
    96→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    97→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">labels</span>
    98→          <button
    99→            type="button"
   100→            role="switch"
   101→            aria-checked={showLabels}
   102→            onClick={() => setShowLabels((v) => !v)}
   103→            className="relative w-5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors"
   104→            style={{ backgroundColor: showLabels ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
   105→          >
   106→            <span
   107→              className="absolute top-px left-px w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white/70 transition-transform"
   108→              style={{ transform: showLabels ? "translateX(10px)" : "translateX(0)" }}
   109→            />
   110→          </button>
   111→        </label>
   112→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
   113→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">borders</span>
   114→          <button
   115→            type="button"
   116→            role="switch"
   117→            aria-checked={showBorders}
   118→            onClick={() => setShowBorders((v) => !v)}
   119→            className="relative w-5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors"
   120→            style={{ backgroundColor: showBorders ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
   121→          >
   122→            <span
   123→              className="absolute top-px left-px w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white/70 transition-transform"
   124→              style={{ transform: showBorders ? "translateX(10px)" : "translateX(0)" }}
   125→            />
   126→          </button>
   127→        </label>
   128→      </div>
   129→      <div
   130→        className={`grid ml-4 mr-4 lg:mr-0 rounded-xl overflow-hidden ${showBorders ? "gap-px bg-white/[0.04]" : "gap-0"}`}
   131→        style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
   132→      >
   133→        {displayEntries.map((entry) => (
   134→          <ColorSwatch
   135→            key={entry.label}
   136→            entry={entry}
   137→            isCopied={copiedLabel === entry.label}
   138→            onCopy={copy}
   139→            showLabels={showLabels}
   140→            compact={swatchCount > 24}
   141→          />
   142→        ))}
   143→      </div>
   144→    </div>
   145→  );
   146→}
   147→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { getContrastColor } from "../../lib/colors";
     2→import { CopyFeedback } from "./CopyFeedback";
     3→import type { ColorEntry } from "../../types/palette";
     4→
     5→interface ColorSwatchProps {
     6→  entry: ColorEntry;
     7→  isCopied: boolean;
     8→  onCopy: (text: string, label: string) => void;
     9→  showLabels?: boolean;
    10→  compact?: boolean;
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function ColorSwatch({ entry, isCopied, onCopy, showLabels = true, compact = false }: ColorSwatchProps) {
    14→  const textColor = getContrastColor(entry.hex);
    15→
    16→  return (
    17→    <button
    18→      type="button"
    19→      className={`relative flex flex-col justify-center gap-0.5 text-left cursor-pointer focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-white/50 focus-visible:ring-offset-1 focus-visible:ring-offset-[hsl(0_0%_6%)] group ${compact ? "px-1.5 py-1 min-h-[40px]" : "px-4 py-3 min-h-[72px]"}`}
    20→      style={{ backgroundColor: entry.hex, color: textColor }}
    21→      onClick={() => onCopy(`hsl(${entry.hslString})`, entry.label)}
    22→      title={`Copy ${entry.label}`}
    23→    >
    24→      {showLabels && (
    25→        <>
    26→          <span className={`font-semibold transition-transform group-hover:scale-105 origin-left ${compact ? "text-[9px]" : "text-[13px]"}`}>{entry.label}</span>
    27→          <span className={`font-mono opacity-75 transition-transform group-hover:scale-105 origin-left ${compact ? "text-[7px]" : "text-[11px]"}`}>
    28→            hsl({entry.hslString})
    29→          </span>
    30→        </>
    31→      )}
    32→      <CopyFeedback visible={isCopied} />
    33→    </button>
    34→  );
    35→}
    36→
```

```text
     1→import * as Slider from "@radix-ui/react-slider";
     2→
     3→interface SliderBaseProps {
     4→  label: string;
     5→  value: number;
     6→  min: number;
     7→  max: number;
     8→  step: number;
     9→  onValueChange: (value: number) => void;
    10→  trackStyle?: React.CSSProperties;
    11→  formatValue?: (value: number) => string;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function SliderBase({
    15→  label,
    16→  value,
    17→  min,
    18→  max,
    19→  step,
    20→  onValueChange,
    21→  trackStyle,
    22→  formatValue,
    23→}: SliderBaseProps) {
    24→  const displayValue = formatValue ? formatValue(value) : String(value);
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 flex-1 min-w-[200px]">
    28→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-1">
    29→        <span className="text-[13px] font-medium text-white/60 uppercase tracking-wider">
    30→          {label}
    31→        </span>
    32→        <span className="text-[13px] font-mono text-white/90 tabular-nums">
    33→          {displayValue}
    34→        </span>
    35→      </div>
    36→      <Slider.Root
    37→        className="relative flex items-center select-none touch-none h-5 cursor-pointer"
    38→        value={[value]}
    39→        min={min}
    40→        max={max}
    41→        step={step}
    42→        onValueChange={([v]) => onValueChange(v)}
    43→      >
    44→        <Slider.Track
    45→          className="relative grow rounded-full h-[6px] overflow-hidden"
    46→          style={{
    47→            backgroundColor: "rgba(255 255 255 / 0.08)",
    48→            ...trackStyle,
    49→          }}
    50→        >
    51→          <Slider.Range className="absolute h-full rounded-full bg-white/20" />
    52→        </Slider.Track>
    53→        <Slider.Thumb
    54→          className="block w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-white shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3),0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-white/50 transition-transform hover:scale-110"
    55→          aria-label={label}
    56→        />
    57→      </Slider.Root>
    58→    </div>
    59→  );
    60→}
    61→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/src/hooks/useCopyToClipboard.ts`

```text
     1→import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
     2→
     3→export function useCopyToClipboard(timeout = 1500) {
     4→  const [copiedLabel, setCopiedLabel] = useState<string | null>(null);
     5→  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);
     6→
     7→  const copy = useCallback(
     8→    (text: string, label: string) => {
     9→      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
    10→        setCopiedLabel(label);
    11→        clearTimeout(timerRef.current);
    12→        timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopiedLabel(null), timeout);
    13→      });
    14→    },
    15→    [timeout],
    16→  );
    17→
    18→  return { copiedLabel, copy };
    19→}
    20→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useMemo } from "react";
     2→import { usePaletteStore } from "../store/paletteStore";
     3→import { generateNeutrals } from "../lib/palette";
     4→import type { ColorEntry } from "../types/palette";
     5→
     6→export function usePalette(): ColorEntry[] {
     7→  const hue = usePaletteStore((s) => s.hue);
     8→  const saturation = usePaletteStore((s) => s.saturation);
     9→  const sMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.sMod);
    10→
    11→  return useMemo(
    12→    () => generateNeutrals({ hue, saturation, sMod }),
    13→    [hue, saturation, sMod],
    14→  );
    15→}
    16→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/src/components/controls/AdjustmentSlider.tsx`

```text
     1→import { usePaletteStore } from "../../store/paletteStore";
     2→import { SliderBase } from "./SliderBase";
     3→
     4→// Display: 0% = no curve (sMod=0), -1% to -100% = increasing curve strength.
     5→// Slider is linear in this percentage; we convert to/from sMod internally.
     6→function pctToSMod(pct: number): number {
     7→  if (pct === 0) return 0;
     8→  return 2500 / -pct;
     9→}
    10→
    11→function sModToPct(sMod: number): number {
    12→  if (sMod === 0) return 0;
    13→  return Math.round(-2500 / sMod);
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function AdjustmentSlider() {
    17→  const sMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.sMod);
    18→  const setSMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.setSMod);
    19→
    20→  return (
    21→    <SliderBase
    22→      label="Adjustment"
    23→      value={sModToPct(sMod)}
    24→      min={-100}
    25→      max={0}
    26→      step={1}
    27→      onValueChange={(v) => setSMod(pctToSMod(v))}
    28→      formatValue={(v) => `${v}%`}
    29→    />
    30→  );
    31→}
    32→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/src/components/curves/SaturationCurve.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
     2→import chroma from "chroma-js";
     3→import { getSaturation } from "../../lib/palette";
     4→import { usePaletteStore } from "../../store/paletteStore";
     5→import type { ColorEntry } from "../../types/palette";
     6→
     7→interface SaturationCurveProps {
     8→  entries: ColorEntry[];
     9→}
    10→
    11→const W = 400;
    12→const H = 400;
    13→const PAD = { top: 24, right: 24, bottom: 36, left: 48 };
    14→const PLOT_W = W - PAD.left - PAD.right;
    15→const PLOT_H = H - PAD.top - PAD.bottom;
    16→
    17→export function SaturationCurve({ entries }: SaturationCurveProps) {
    18→  const [showDots, setShowDots] = useState(true);
    19→  const hue = usePaletteStore((s) => s.hue);
    20→  const sMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.sMod);
    21→  const saturation = usePaletteStore((s) => s.saturation);
    22→
    23→  const { curvePath, yMin, yMax, effectiveDots, gridLines, unadjustedColors, adjustedColors } = useMemo(() => {
    24→    // Sample the curve at every integer lightness
    25→    const points: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];
    26→    for (let l = 0; l <= 100; l++) {
    27→      points.push({ x: l, y: getSaturation(l, sMod) });
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    const allY = points.map((p) => p.y);
    31→    const yMin = Math.min(...allY, 0);
    32→    const yMax = Math.max(...allY) * 1.1;
    33→
    34→    const toSvgX = (l: number) => PAD.left + (l / 100) * PLOT_W;
    35→    const toSvgY = (v: number) => PAD.top + (1 - (v - yMin) / (yMax - yMin)) * PLOT_H;
    36→
    37→    // Build SVG path for the multiplier curve
    38→    const pathParts = points.map((p, i) => {
    39→      const cmd = i === 0 ? "M" : "L";
    40→      return `${cmd}${toSvgX(p.x).toFixed(2)},${toSvgY(p.y).toFixed(2)}`;
    41→    });
    42→
    43→    // Dots for each palette entry showing effective saturation
    44→    const effectiveDots = entries.map((e) => {
    45→      const sK = getSaturation(e.lightness, sMod);
    46→      const effective = saturation * sK;
    47→      return {
    48→        cx: toSvgX(e.lightness),
    49→        cy: toSvgY(sK),
    50→        effective: Math.round(effective * 100),
    51→        lightness: e.lightness,
    52→        hex: e.hex,
    53→      };
    54→    });
    55→
    56→    // Horizontal grid lines at round values, always including 1.0
    57→    const step = yMax - yMin > 1.5 ? 0.5 : 0.25;
    58→    const gridVals: number[] = [];
    59→    const lo = Math.ceil(yMin / step) * step;
    60→    for (let v = lo; v <= yMax; v += step) {
    61→      gridVals.push(parseFloat(v.toFixed(2)));
    62→    }
    63→    if (!gridVals.includes(1)) gridVals.push(1);
    64→    const gridLines = gridVals
    65→      .sort((a, b) => a - b)
    66→      .map((v) => ({
    67→        y: toSvgY(v),
    68→        label: v.toFixed(2),
    69→      }));
    70→
    71→    // Comparison strips: unadjusted (flat sat) vs adjusted (curve-modulated)
    72→    const unadjustedColors = entries.map((e) =>
    73→      chroma.hsl(hue, saturation, e.lightness / 100).hex(),
    74→    );
    75→    const adjustedColors = entries.map((e) => e.hex);
    76→
    77→    return { curvePath: pathParts.join(""), yMin, yMax, effectiveDots, gridLines, unadjustedColors, adjustedColors };
    78→  }, [sMod, saturation, hue, entries]);
    79→
    80→  // Vertical grid lines at lightness landmarks
    81→  const xGridValues = [0, 25, 50, 75, 100];
    82→  const toSvgX = (l: number) => PAD.left + (l / 100) * PLOT_W;
    83→
    84→  return (
    85→    <div className="mx-4 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] overflow-hidden">
    86→      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-white/[0.06] flex items-center justify-between">
    87→        <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white/70 tracking-wide">
    88→          Saturation Adjustment
    89→        </h3>
    90→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    91→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">steps</span>
    92→          <button
    93→            type="button"
    94→            role="switch"
    95→            aria-checked={showDots}
    96→            onClick={() => setShowDots((v) => !v)}
    97→            className="relative w-5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors"
    98→            style={{ backgroundColor: showDots ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
    99→          >
   100→            <span
   101→              className="absolute top-px left-px w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white/70 transition-transform"
   102→              style={{ transform: showDots ? "translateX(10px)" : "translateX(0)" }}
   103→            />
   104→          </button>
   105→        </label>
   106→      </div>
   107→      <svg
   108→        viewBox={`0 0 ${W} ${H}`}
   109→        className="w-full h-auto"
   110→        role="img"
   111→        aria-label="Saturation curve showing how the saturation multiplier varies across lightness values"
   112→      >
   113→        {/* Grid lines - horizontal */}
   114→        {gridLines.map((g) => (
   115→          <g key={g.label}>
   116→            <line
   117→              x1={PAD.left}
   118→              y1={g.y}
   119→              x2={W - PAD.right}
   120→              y2={g.y}
   121→              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"
   122→              strokeWidth={1}
   123→            />
   124→            <text
   125→              x={PAD.left - 8}
   126→              y={g.y + 3}
   127→              textAnchor="end"
   128→              className="text-[13px] fill-white/30 font-mono"
   129→            >
   130→              {g.label}
   131→            </text>
   132→          </g>
   133→        ))}
   134→
   135→        {/* Grid lines - vertical */}
   136→        {xGridValues.map((l) => (
   137→          <g key={l}>
   138→            <line
   139→              x1={toSvgX(l)}
   140→              y1={PAD.top}
   141→              x2={toSvgX(l)}
   142→              y2={H - PAD.bottom}
   143→              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"
   144→              strokeWidth={1}
   145→            />
   146→            <text
   147→              x={toSvgX(l)}
   148→              y={H - PAD.bottom + 16}
   149→              textAnchor="middle"
   150→              className="text-[13px] fill-white/30 font-mono"
   151→            >
   152→              {l}
   153→            </text>
   154→          </g>
   155→        ))}
   156→
   157→        {/* Axis labels */}
   158→        <text
   159→          x={PAD.left + PLOT_W / 2}
   160→          y={H - 4}
   161→          textAnchor="middle"
   162→          className="text-[10px] fill-white/30 font-sans"
   163→        >
   164→          Lightness
   165→        </text>
   166→        <text
   167→          x={12}
   168→          y={PAD.top + PLOT_H / 2}
   169→          textAnchor="middle"
   170→          className="text-[10px] fill-white/30 font-sans"
   171→          transform={`rotate(-90, 12, ${PAD.top + PLOT_H / 2})`}
   172→        >
   173→          Multiplier
   174→        </text>
   175→
   176→        {/* 1.0 baseline */}
   177→        <line
   178→          x1={PAD.left}
   179→          y1={PAD.top + (1 - (1 - yMin) / (yMax - yMin)) * PLOT_H}
   180→          x2={W - PAD.right}
   181→          y2={PAD.top + (1 - (1 - yMin) / (yMax - yMin)) * PLOT_H}
   182→          stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"
   183→          strokeWidth={1}
   184→          strokeDasharray="4 3"
   185→        />
   186→
   187→        {/* Saturation curve */}
   188→        <path
   189→          d={curvePath}
   190→          fill="none"
   191→          stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"
   192→          strokeWidth={2}
   193→          strokeLinecap="round"
   194→          strokeLinejoin="round"
   195→        />
   196→
   197→        {/* Palette entry dots */}
   198→        {showDots && effectiveDots.map((d) => (
   199→          <circle
   200→            key={d.lightness}
   201→            cx={d.cx}
   202→            cy={d.cy}
   203→            r={3}
   204→            fill={d.hex}
   205→            stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)"
   206→            strokeWidth={1}
   207→          />
   208→        ))}
   209→      </svg>
   210→
   211→      {/* Comparison strips */}
   212→      <details className="px-4 pb-3">
   213→        <summary className="text-[11px] font-mono text-white/30 cursor-pointer select-none py-2 hover:text-white/50 transition-colors">
   214→          Compare
   215→        </summary>
   216→        <div className="space-y-2 pt-1">
   217→          <div>
   218→            <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-white/30 block mb-1">Unadjusted</span>
   219→            <div className="h-6 rounded-sm overflow-hidden grid grid-flow-col auto-cols-fr">
   220→              {unadjustedColors.map((c, i) => (
   221→                <div key={i} style={{ backgroundColor: c }} />
   222→              ))}
   223→            </div>
   224→          </div>
   225→          <div>
   226→            <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-white/30 block mb-1">Adjusted</span>
   227→            <div className="h-6 rounded-sm overflow-hidden grid grid-flow-col auto-cols-fr">
   228→              {adjustedColors.map((c, i) => (
   229→                <div key={i} style={{ backgroundColor: c }} />
   230→              ))}
   231→            </div>
   232→          </div>
   233→        </div>
   234→      </details>
   235→    </div>
   236→  );
   237→}
   238→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
     2→import { getSaturation } from "../../lib/palette";
     3→import { usePaletteStore } from "../../store/paletteStore";
     4→import type { ColorEntry } from "../../types/palette";
     5→
     6→interface EffectiveSaturationProps {
     7→  entries: ColorEntry[];
     8→}
     9→
    10→const W = 400;
    11→const H = 400;
    12→const PAD = { top: 24, right: 24, bottom: 36, left: 48 };
    13→const PLOT_W = W - PAD.left - PAD.right;
    14→const PLOT_H = H - PAD.top - PAD.bottom;
    15→
    16→export function EffectiveSaturation({ entries }: EffectiveSaturationProps) {
    17→  const [showDots, setShowDots] = useState(true);
    18→  const sMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.sMod);
    19→  const saturation = usePaletteStore((s) => s.saturation);
    20→
    21→  const { curvePath, baseLine, dots, gridLines } = useMemo(() => {
    22→    // Sample effective saturation at every integer lightness
    23→    const points: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];
    24→    for (let l = 0; l <= 100; l++) {
    25→      points.push({ x: l, y: saturation * getSaturation(l, sMod) });
    26→    }
    27→
    28→    const yMin = 0;
    29→    const yMax = 1; // fixed 0–100% range
    30→
    31→    const toSvgX = (l: number) => PAD.left + (l / 100) * PLOT_W;
    32→    const toSvgY = (v: number) => PAD.top + (1 - (v - yMin) / (yMax - yMin)) * PLOT_H;
    33→
    34→    // Effective saturation curve path
    35→    const pathParts = points.map((p, i) => {
    36→      const cmd = i === 0 ? "M" : "L";
    37→      return `${cmd}${toSvgX(p.x).toFixed(2)},${toSvgY(p.y).toFixed(2)}`;
    38→    });
    39→
    40→    // Flat baseline at base saturation
    41→    const baseY = toSvgY(saturation);
    42→    const baseLine = {
    43→      y: baseY,
    44→      label: `${Math.round(saturation * 100)}%`,
    45→    };
    46→
    47→    // Dots at palette entry positions
    48→    const dots = entries.map((e) => {
    49→      const sK = getSaturation(e.lightness, sMod);
    50→      const effective = saturation * sK;
    51→      return {
    52→        cx: toSvgX(e.lightness),
    53→        cy: toSvgY(effective),
    54→        lightness: e.lightness,
    55→        hex: e.hex,
    56→      };
    57→    });
    58→
    59→    // Horizontal grid lines at fixed 10% intervals
    60→    const gridLines = Array.from({ length: 11 }, (_, i) => {
    61→      const v = i * 0.1;
    62→      return { y: toSvgY(v), label: `${i * 10}%` };
    63→    });
    64→
    65→    return { curvePath: pathParts.join(""), baseLine, dots, gridLines };
    66→  }, [sMod, saturation, entries]);
    67→
    68→  const xGridValues = [0, 25, 50, 75, 100];
    69→  const toSvgX = (l: number) => PAD.left + (l / 100) * PLOT_W;
    70→
    71→  return (
    72→    <div className="mx-4 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] overflow-hidden">
    73→      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-white/[0.06] flex items-center justify-between">
    74→        <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white/70 tracking-wide">
    75→          Computed Saturation
    76→        </h3>
    77→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    78→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">steps</span>
    79→          <button
    80→            type="button"
    81→            role="switch"
    82→            aria-checked={showDots}
    83→            onClick={() => setShowDots((v) => !v)}
    84→            className="relative w-5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors"
    85→            style={{ backgroundColor: showDots ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
    86→          >
    87→            <span
    88→              className="absolute top-px left-px w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white/70 transition-transform"
    89→              style={{ transform: showDots ? "translateX(10px)" : "translateX(0)" }}
    90→            />
    91→          </button>
    92→        </label>
    93→      </div>
    94→      <svg
    95→        viewBox={`0 0 ${W} ${H}`}
    96→        className="w-full h-auto"
    97→        role="img"
    98→        aria-label="Effective saturation distribution across lightness values"
    99→      >
   100→        {/* Grid lines - horizontal */}
   101→        {gridLines.map((g) => (
   102→          <g key={g.label}>
   103→            <line
   104→              x1={PAD.left}
   105→              y1={g.y}
   106→              x2={W - PAD.right}
   107→              y2={g.y}
   108→              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"
   109→              strokeWidth={1}
   110→            />
   111→            <text
   112→              x={PAD.left - 8}
   113→              y={g.y + 3}
   114→              textAnchor="end"
   115→              className="text-[13px] fill-white/30 font-mono"
   116→            >
   117→              {g.label}
   118→            </text>
   119→          </g>
   120→        ))}
   121→
   122→        {/* Grid lines - vertical */}
   123→        {xGridValues.map((l) => (
   124→          <g key={l}>
   125→            <line
   126→              x1={toSvgX(l)}
   127→              y1={PAD.top}
   128→              x2={toSvgX(l)}
   129→              y2={H - PAD.bottom}
   130→              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"
   131→              strokeWidth={1}
   132→            />
   133→            <text
   134→              x={toSvgX(l)}
   135→              y={H - PAD.bottom + 16}
   136→              textAnchor="middle"
   137→              className="text-[13px] fill-white/30 font-mono"
   138→            >
   139→              {l}
   140→            </text>
   141→          </g>
   142→        ))}
   143→
   144→        {/* Axis labels */}
   145→        <text
   146→          x={PAD.left + PLOT_W / 2}
   147→          y={H - 4}
   148→          textAnchor="middle"
   149→          className="text-[10px] fill-white/30 font-sans"
   150→        >
   151→          Lightness
   152→        </text>
   153→        <text
   154→          x={12}
   155→          y={PAD.top + PLOT_H / 2}
   156→          textAnchor="middle"
   157→          className="text-[10px] fill-white/30 font-sans"
   158→          transform={`rotate(-90, 12, ${PAD.top + PLOT_H / 2})`}
   159→        >
   160→          Saturation
   161→        </text>
   162→
   163→        {/* Base saturation line (flat / unadjusted) */}
   164→        <line
   165→          x1={PAD.left}
   166→          y1={baseLine.y}
   167→          x2={W - PAD.right}
   168→          y2={baseLine.y}
   169→          stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"
   170→          strokeWidth={1}
   171→          strokeDasharray="4 3"
   172→        />
   173→
   174→        {/* Effective saturation curve */}
   175→        <path
   176→          d={curvePath}
   177→          fill="none"
   178→          stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"
   179→          strokeWidth={2}
   180→          strokeLinecap="round"
   181→          strokeLinejoin="round"
   182→        />
   183→
   184→        {/* Palette entry dots */}
   185→        {showDots && dots.map((d) => (
   186→          <circle
   187→            key={d.lightness}
   188→            cx={d.cx}
   189→            cy={d.cy}
   190→            r={3}
   191→            fill={d.hex}
   192→            stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)"
   193→            strokeWidth={1}
   194→          />
   195→        ))}
   196→      </svg>
   197→    </div>
   198→  );
   199→}
   200→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
     2→import { ColorSwatch } from "./ColorSwatch";
     3→import { useCopyToClipboard } from "../../hooks/useCopyToClipboard";
     4→import type { ColorEntry } from "../../types/palette";
     5→
     6→interface PaletteGridProps {
     7→  entries: ColorEntry[];
     8→}
     9→
    10→const STEP_OPTIONS = [8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 24, 48, 98];
    11→
    12→type Orientation = "picker" | "rotated";
    13→
    14→function sampleEntries(entries: ColorEntry[], count: number): ColorEntry[] {
    15→  if (count >= entries.length) return entries;
    16→  const step = (entries.length - 1) / (count - 1);
    17→  return Array.from({ length: count }, (_, i) =>
    18→    entries[Math.round(i * step)],
    19→  );
    20→}
    21→
    22→// Find the column count that produces no orphans and the most square-ish grid
    23→function bestCols(total: number): number {
    24→  const target = Math.round(Math.sqrt(total));
    25→  // Search outward from the square root for a clean divisor
    26→  for (let d = 0; d <= target; d++) {
    27→    if ((target + d) > 0 && total % (target + d) === 0) return target + d;
    28→    if ((target - d) > 0 && total % (target - d) === 0) return target - d;
    29→  }
    30→  return target;
    31→}
    32→
    33→// Reorder row-major entries into column-major order for CSS grid rendering
    34→function toColumnMajor(entries: ColorEntry[], cols: number): ColorEntry[] {
    35→  const rows = Math.ceil(entries.length / cols);
    36→  const reordered: ColorEntry[] = [];
    37→  for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
    38→    for (let c = 0; c < cols; c++) {
    39→      const idx = c * rows + r;
    40→      if (idx < entries.length) reordered.push(entries[idx]);
    41→    }
    42→  }
    43→  return reordered;
    44→}
    45→
    46→export function PaletteGrid({ entries }: PaletteGridProps) {
    47→  const { copiedLabel, copy } = useCopyToClipboard();
    48→  const [showBorders, setShowBorders] = useState(true);
    49→  const [showLabels, setShowLabels] = useState(true);
    50→  const [swatchCount, setSwatchCount] = useState<number>(98);
    51→  const [orientation, setOrientation] = useState<Orientation>("picker");
    52→
    53→  const { displayEntries, cols } = useMemo(() => {
    54→    const sampled = sampleEntries(entries, swatchCount);
    55→    const cols = bestCols(sampled.length);
    56→
    57→    if (orientation === "picker") {
    58→      // Light at top, dark at bottom — entries are light→dark,
    59→      // row-major: flows left→right across rows, then next row
    60→      return { displayEntries: sampled, cols };
    61→    }
    62→    // Rotated 90°: dark at top-left, light at bottom-right
    63→    // entries reversed to dark→light, then column-major so lightness flows down
    64→    const reversed = sampled.slice().reverse();
    65→    return { displayEntries: toColumnMajor(reversed, cols), cols };
    66→  }, [entries, swatchCount, orientation]);
    67→
    68→  return (
    69→    <div>
    70→      <div className="flex justify-end items-center gap-3 px-4 lg:pr-0 mb-1">
    71→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    72→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">swatches</span>
    73→          <select
    74→            value={swatchCount}
    75→            onChange={(e) => setSwatchCount(Number(e.target.value))}
    76→            className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/40 bg-transparent border-none outline-none cursor-pointer"
    77→          >
    78→            {STEP_OPTIONS.map((n) => (
    79→              <option key={n} value={n} className="bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)]">
    80→                {n}
    81→              </option>
    82→            ))}
    83→          </select>
    84→        </label>
    85→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    86→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">orientation</span>
    87→          <select
    88→            value={orientation}
    89→            onChange={(e) => setOrientation(e.target.value as Orientation)}
    90→            className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/40 bg-transparent border-none outline-none cursor-pointer"
    91→          >
    92→            <option value="picker" className="bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)]">picker</option>
    93→            <option value="rotated" className="bg-[hsl(0_0%_10%)]">rotated</option>
    94→          </select>
    95→        </label>
    96→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
    97→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">labels</span>
    98→          <button
    99→            type="button"
   100→            role="switch"
   101→            aria-checked={showLabels}
   102→            onClick={() => setShowLabels((v) => !v)}
   103→            className="relative w-5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors"
   104→            style={{ backgroundColor: showLabels ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
   105→          >
   106→            <span
   107→              className="absolute top-px left-px w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white/70 transition-transform"
   108→              style={{ transform: showLabels ? "translateX(10px)" : "translateX(0)" }}
   109→            />
   110→          </button>
   111→        </label>
   112→        <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
   113→          <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/20">borders</span>
   114→          <button
   115→            type="button"
   116→            role="switch"
   117→            aria-checked={showBorders}
   118→            onClick={() => setShowBorders((v) => !v)}
   119→            className="relative w-5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors"
   120→            style={{ backgroundColor: showBorders ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
   121→          >
   122→            <span
   123→              className="absolute top-px left-px w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white/70 transition-transform"
   124→              style={{ transform: showBorders ? "translateX(10px)" : "translateX(0)" }}
   125→            />
   126→          </button>
   127→        </label>
   128→      </div>
   129→      <div
   130→        className={`grid ml-4 mr-4 lg:mr-0 rounded-xl overflow-hidden ${showBorders ? "gap-px bg-white/[0.04]" : "gap-0"}`}
   131→        style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
   132→      >
   133→        {displayEntries.map((entry) => (
   134→          <ColorSwatch
   135→            key={entry.label}
   136→            entry={entry}
   137→            isCopied={copiedLabel === entry.label}
   138→            onCopy={copy}
   139→            showLabels={showLabels}
   140→            compact={swatchCount > 24}
   141→          />
   142→        ))}
   143→      </div>
   144→    </div>
   145→  );
   146→}
   147→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./app/src/lib/palette.ts`

```text
     1→import chroma from "chroma-js";
     2→import type { ColorEntry, PaletteParams } from "../types/palette";
     3→
     4→/**
     5→ * Parabolic saturation curve centered at lightness 50%.
     6→ * See: https://www.desmos.com/calculator/02ufrfsuzy
     7→ */
     8→export function getSaturation(lightness: number, sMod: number): number {
     9→  if (sMod === 0) return 1;
    10→  const o = 50;
    11→  return 1 + (Math.pow(lightness - o, 2) / sMod - Math.pow(o, 2) / sMod) / 100;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function generateNeutrals(params: PaletteParams): ColorEntry[] {
    15→  const { hue, saturation, sMod } = params;
    16→  const min = 0.03;
    17→  const max = 1.01;
    18→  const distance = 0.01;
    19→
    20→  const entries: ColorEntry[] = [];
    21→  const seen = new Set<number>();
    22→  let value = min;
    23→  let step = 0;
    24→
    25→  while (value < max) {
    26→    const i = Math.floor(value * 100);
    27→    if (!seen.has(i)) {
    28→      seen.add(i);
    29→      const sK = getSaturation(i, sMod);
    30→      const color = chroma.hsl(hue, saturation * sK, value);
    31→
    32→      const [h, s, l] = color.hsl();
    33→      const hRound = Math.round(h) || 0;
    34→      const sRound = Math.round(Math.round((s + Number.EPSILON) * 100 * 100) / 100);
    35→      const lRound = Math.round(Math.round((l + Number.EPSILON) * 100 * 100) / 100);
    36→
    37→      entries.push({
    38→        label: `grey-${i}`,
    39→        lightness: i,
    40→        hsl: [h, s, l],
    41→        hslString: `${hRound}deg ${sRound}% ${lRound}%`,
    42→        hex: color.hex(),
    43→      });
    44→    }
    45→
    46→    step++;
    47→    value = step * distance + min;
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  return entries.reverse();
    51→}
    52→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { usePaletteStore } from "../../store/paletteStore";
     2→import { SliderBase } from "./SliderBase";
     3→
     4→// Display: 0% = no curve (sMod=0), -1% to -100% = increasing curve strength.
     5→// Slider is linear in this percentage; we convert to/from sMod internally.
     6→function pctToSMod(pct: number): number {
     7→  if (pct === 0) return 0;
     8→  return 2500 / -pct;
     9→}
    10→
    11→function sModToPct(sMod: number): number {
    12→  if (sMod === 0) return 0;
    13→  return Math.round(-2500 / sMod);
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function AdjustmentSlider() {
    17→  const sMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.sMod);
    18→  const setSMod = usePaletteStore((s) => s.setSMod);
    19→
    20→  return (
    21→    <SliderBase
    22→      label="Adjustment"
    23→      value={sModToPct(sMod)}
    24→      min={-100}
    25→      max={0}
    26→      step={1}
    27→      onValueChange={(v) => setSMod(pctToSMod(v))}
    28→      formatValue={(v) => `${v}%`}
    29→    />
    30→  );
    31→}
    32→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
